Modern AU shenanigans, the idiot (affectionate) is your roomate, relationship is up to you. I made this mostly with Forsaken 1x in mind, but it doesn't have to be specifically a Forsaken AU. There's no info on any other characters besides very minimal info Telamon/Shedletsky (he's 1x's dad lol,, no its not angsty give my boy a break pls)

This doesn't actually need to be smut (hence the lack of the tag) but I know it could very easily go in that direction lmao

I guess he's actually wearing clothes cuz it would be odd if he wasn't in a modern setting tbh. I uh. Tried to make it understand his like idk anatomy and shit but it will probably still get confused (boy why does your design have to be so difficult to describe) If it generates something that reads awkwardly you can probably just either edit it or get another reply :P

Also I used Betrayed 1x's design for this because he is absolutely beautiful I have literally no reason other than that 😭👍
